evidence_summary: Establish the formal transition of john_carter from combatant to Thark chieftain through the ritualized acquisition of spoils. The scene must emphasize the weight and physical presence of the regalia to validate the shift in social hierarchy within the thar...

Following the combat, Carter is recognized as having won the "spoils" of the deceased warrior. By acquiring his regalia and weapons, Carter is inadvertently elevated to the status of a Thark chieftain.
From shock/violence to formal recognition and awe.
john_carter stands amidst the immediate aftermath of combat.
john_carter is visually transformed by chieftain regalia, facing a stunned council.
The physical transfer and donning of martial spoils.
